evals.prompt: Show a minimal Python NVTX function-range test.
evals.expected_output: Provides a copy-paste-safe NVTX setup using the bundled sitecustomize helper through PYTHONPATH and nsys capture.
assertions: Installs/imports nvtx only in the target environment
Uses NVTX_PROFILE_PYTHON and optional include/exclude filters
Uses copy-paste-safe NVTX_SKILL_DIR discovery or explicit path

evals.prompt: CARB_PROFILING_PYTHON does not work in my standalone Python script. What should I use?
evals.expected_output: Routes to NVTX Python function tracing for non-Kit environments and explains Carbonite is unavailable.
assertions: Explains this is for non-Kit/Carbonite environments
Keeps tracing scope limited to reduce overhead
